name: Men's Spring Hinges Rectangle Square Metal Sunglasses - Goodfellow & Co™ Gold: UV Protection, Recycled Metal
description: Update your collection of sunny day accessories with the classic style of these Spring Hinges Rectangle Metal Sunglasses from Goodfellow & Co™. The sunglasses sport a cool square shape that flatters various face shapes, and they feature a metal frame in an attractive gold finish for a fashionable look that's easy to style. The spring-hinged temples offer comfortable wear, and UV protection helps keep your eyes safe from the sun, making these sunglasses a go-to pick no matter what your day holds.
